pi_items.source: NotepadApp is custom Android project created specifically for this benchmark task, not derived from public source

privileged_info_summary: The add_unit_test task requires creating three JUnit test files (NoteValidatorTest.kt, NoteFormatterTest.kt, NoteTest.kt) in a synthetic Android app called NotepadApp. The app contains: NoteValidator with 5 validation methods (isValidTitle, isValidContent, isNoteComplete, isValidId, isValidColor), NoteFormatter with 4+ formatting methods (formatTitle, formatPreview, formatDate, formatWordCount, formatMetadata), and Note data class with helper methods (wordCount, charCount, formattedCreatedDate, formattedUpdatedDate, isModified, touch). Each test file must contain at least 3 @Test methods. Scoring is 100 points: 20 per test file with >=3 tests, 15 for compilation, 25 for test execution. Task passes with 70+ points. Timeout is 420 seconds (7 minutes), max 80 steps. Data is synthetic (custom benchmark app), located at /workspace/data/NotepadApp in the task environment.
